response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and AI-agent infrastructure experience, particularly with TypeScript, Node.js, and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tools. While his AI/GenAI experience is not as explicitly detailed as the job requires, his technical leadership, cloud exposure, and open-source contributions suggest adaptability. A deeper dive into his AI-specific projects and leadership would clarify fit.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud technologies (AWS, Kubernetes).
Proven technical leadership and mentorship through workshops, talks, and open-source contributions.
Hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure (MCP) and developer tooling at re:cinq.
concerns: AI/GenAI experience is not as prominently detailed as required (8+ years building production-grade AI solutions).
Lacks explicit mention of vector databases, RAG architectures, or multi-agent system frameworks (e.g., LangGraph).
No advanced degree (Master's/PhD) in AI or related fields, though this is preferred, not required.
